service.name: Anthropic Claude API
service.description_for_ai: Anthropic Claude AI models. Best-in-class for coding, long-context analysis, and safe, reliable outputs. Claude Haiku 4.5 for fast/cheap tasks, Claude Sonnet 4.6 for balanced quality, Claude Opus 4.6 for frontier capability. OpenAI-compatible chat format with extended thinking support.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://console.anthropic.com — free tier available
auth.cost: Haiku 4.5: $0.80/$4 per 1M tokens. Sonnet 4.6: $3/$15. Opus 4.6: $15/$75 per 1M tokens

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate responses using Claude models. Excellent for coding, analysis, writing, and tasks requiring careful reasoning. Supports vision (images), tool use, and extended thinking for complex problems.

messages.description: Array of {role, content} objects. Roles: user, assistant

thinking.description: {type: enabled, budget_tokens: N} for extended thinking on Opus

capabilities.description_for_ai: Analyze images with Claude. Pass images as base64 or URL in message content. Best for document analysis, screenshot understanding, diagram interpretation.

messages.description: Include {type: image, source: {type: base64, media_type: image/jpeg, data: ...}} in content

agent_hints.model_choice: Haiku 4.5 for classification, extraction, simple tasks. Sonnet 4.6 for most production use. Opus 4.6 for complex reasoning, coding, long documents.
agent_hints.system_prompt: Always use system prompt to set context — Claude follows instructions more reliably with a clear system prompt.
agent_hints.thinking: Extended thinking available on Opus: set thinking.type=enabled and thinking.budget_tokens. Shows reasoning chain before final answer.
agent_hints.prompt_caching: Use prompt caching for repeated system prompts — up to 90% cost reduction. Add cache_control: {type: ephemeral} to reused blocks.
agent_hints.tool_use: Claude is excellent at multi-step tool use. Define tools with JSON Schema, Claude calls them autonomously.
